title: Continuation of the Report of Abu Zayd /, z8 [Abu Bakr's Illness and Death
description: `Ali b. Muhammad, according to his isndd, which has been mentioned before: Khalid came to Damascus, and the governor of Bu$ra massed [his forces) against him. Khalid set out against him, he and `Abu `Ubaydah. Adrunjar met them, and Khalid triumphed over them, defeating them so that they entered their fortress and sought a peace agreement. He made peace with them on condition that [they pay] a dinar for each person every year, and a jarib", of wheat. Then the enemy came back against the Muslims. The Muslims' troops came all together to Ajnadayn.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 11
